mapper.insert: insert into shop_browsing_logs (member_id, guest_id, product_id, product_name, category_id, source, create_time) values (#{memberId}, #{guestId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{source}, now())
mapper.select: select product_id as productId, product_name as productName, count(*) as viewCount from shop_browsing_logs where create_time >= #{since} group by product_id, product_name order by viewCount desc limit #{limit}
